segments.text: The salary curve in the Indian market has shifted. Engineering isn't on the top anymore. Content is the average engineering fresher earned around four
to five lakh perom in 2010 and even today most freshers still started 4 to 6 lakh perom despite the industry growing
massively. In the same period the creator economy exploded. In-house creators make 7 to 12 LPA. Creator marketers and social media strategists
earned 5 to 10 LPA. YouTube alone reported 7 lakh jobs created in India through creators back in 2022. India saw
the IT boom in the 2000s, the startup boom in the 2000s and 10s and now we're entering the AI plus content boom. But here's the real gap. Where do you
actually learn these skills? That's exactly why we built Jensen, an offline content creation school in Bengaluru. You'll be mentored directly by Vun Maya,
the creator behind AVTV, full disclosure breakdown and a portfolio of 55 plus channels with over 1 billion monthly
views. Check the link in bio to get the application link.
